nasb.text: There was a certain man of Zorah, of the family of the Danites, whose name was Manoah; and his wife was barren and had borne no children.

esv.text: There was a certain man of Zorah, of the tribe of the Danites, whose name was Manoah. And his wife was barren and had no children.

cnv.text: 那時有一個瑣拉人，是屬於但支派的，名叫瑪挪亞；他的妻子不能生育，沒有孩子。

ccb.text: 琐拉城住了一个但支派的人，名叫玛挪亚。他妻子不能生养，没有孩子。
